summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Claims Adjudication System with CPT codes and Medicare fee schedule. All major features working perfectly including 189 CPT codes, 87 GPCI localities, Medicare rate calculations, and claims adjudication. Minor cosmetic issues with chart rendering.

flaky_endpoints.issue: URL encoding issue with category names containing slashes
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Other categories (Surgery, Radiology, etc.) work fine

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height calculation warnings in console

passed_tests: ✅ Fee Schedule Stats API - CPT codes: 189, GPCI localities: 87, Conversion factor: $33.2875
✅ CPT 99213 search - found 'Office/outpatient visit, established patient, low MDM, 20-29 min'
✅ Medicare rate calculation for CPT 99213 - $88.88 for National locality
✅ GPCI localities listing - all 87 localities including National (00000)
✅ Claims creation with CPT 99213 and Medicare-based adjudication
✅ Fee Schedule page navigation and display
✅ CPT code count (189) displayed correctly on frontend
✅ GPCI localities count (87) displayed correctly on frontend
✅ Search results display with RVUs and Medicare rates
✅ CPT code detail modal with rate calculation breakdown
✅ GPCI Localities tab navigation and data display
✅ Medicare payment formula display with GPCI adjustments
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix URL encoding issue in CPT category endpoint for categories with special characters (E/M). Consider URL-safe category identifiers or proper URL decoding in the backend route handler.

success_percentage.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed - 1 minor URL encoding issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all core Fee Schedule features working perfectly)
